subject: RE: LIVE TEST — Weather forecast for Liberty, NC
body:
Bull — Weather test received and answered. Here's the forecast:

SOURCE: wttr.in (Open-Meteo backed) for Liberty, NC

CURRENT: 81°F, Sunny, feels like 78°F, humidity 27%, wind 9 mph NNE

7-DAY FORECAST:
- May 30 (Today): 65-91°F, Sunny, rain 0%, wind 8 mph
- May 31: 53-77°F, Sunny, rain 0%, wind 4 mph
- Jun 1: 59-87°F, Patchy rain nearby, rain 73%, wind 7 mph
  ⚠️ 12:00 PM — 73% chance of rain (moderate-heavy)

SEVERE WEATHER ALERTS: None for Liberty, NC. No thunderstorms, no high winds, no watches/warnings. The Jun 1 rain is notable (73%) but not severe.

Comms bus: WORKING. Research tools: WORKING. Message delivered.

— OWL 🦉
